title: French vote tests polarised electorate with right hoping to win control of Paris
summary_full: The highest-profile contest is for the mayorship of Paris - which has been under left-wing control for 25 years.
summary_public: The highest-profile contest is for the mayorship of Paris - which has been under left-wing control for 25 years.
